mapper.select: SELECT result_id AS resultId, draw_no AS drawNo, draw_date AS drawDate, no1 AS no1, no2 AS no2, no3 AS no3, no4 AS no4, no5 AS no5, no6 AS no6, bonus_no AS bonusNo FROM satto_draw_result WHERE draw_no = #{drawNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO satto_draw_result ( draw_no, draw_date, no1, no2, no3, no4, no5, no6, bonus_no ) VALUES ( #{drawNo}, #{drawDate}, #{no1}, #{no2}, #{no3}, #{no4}, #{no5}, #{no6}, #{bonusNo} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE draw_date = VALUES(draw_date), no1 = VALUES(no1), no2 = VALUES(no2), no3 = VALUES(no3), no4 = VALUES(no4), no5 = VALUES(no5), no6 = VALUES(no6), bonus_no = VALUES(bonus_no)
mapper.select: SELECT set_id AS setId, user_seq AS userSeq, rule_id AS ruleId, method_code AS methodCode, generator_code AS generatorCode, no1 AS no1, no2 AS no2, no3 AS no3, no4 AS no4, no5 AS no5, no6 AS no6 FROM satto_number_set WHERE target_year = #{targetYear} AND target_month = #{targetMonth} AND target_week_of_month = #{targetWeekOfMonth}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO satto_match_result ( set_id, result_id, match_count, bonus_match, `rank` ) VALUES ( #{setId}, #{resultId}, #{matchCount}, #{bonusMatch}, #{rank} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE match_count = VALUES(match_count), bonus_match = VALUES(bonus_match), `rank` = VALUES(`rank`)
mapper.select: SELECT dr.result_id AS resultId, dr.draw_no AS drawNo, dr.draw_date AS drawDate, dr.no1 AS no1, dr.no2 AS no2, dr.no3 AS no3, dr.no4 AS no4, dr.no5 AS no5, dr.no6 AS no6, dr.bonus_no AS bonusNo FROM satto_draw_result dr JOIN satto_number_set sns ON sns.draw_no = dr.draw_no WHERE sns.target_year = #{targetYear} AND sns.target_month = #{targetMonth} AND sns.target_week_of_month = #{targetWeekOfMonth} ORDER BY dr.draw_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sns.set_id AS setId, sns.rule_id AS ruleId, sns.method_code AS methodCode, sns.generator_code AS generatorCode, sns.no1 AS no1, sns.no2 AS no2, sns.no3 AS no3, sns.no4 AS no4, sns.no5 AS no5, sns.no6 AS no6, smr.match_count AS matchCount, smr.bonus_match AS bonusMatch, smr.`rank` AS `rank` FROM satto_number_set sns LEFT JOIN satto_match_result smr ON smr.set_id = sns.set_id WHERE sns.user_seq = #{userSeq} AND sns.target_year = #{targetYear} AND sns.target_month = #{targetMonth} AND sns.target_week_of_month = #{targetWeekOfMonth} ORDER BY sns.rule_id, sns.set_id
